CustomField.formula: IF(( (BI_Data__r.ARR__c>=100000 && (Owner.Division='ENT CSM - Europe'||Owner.Division='Global CSM - Europe' ||Owner.Division='ENT CSM - France' ||Owner.Division='ENT CSM - US'|| Owner.Division='Global CSM - US'|| Owner.Division='Global CSM - Investors' ||Owner.Division='Reseller - Japan' ||Owner.Division='Reseller - ANZ - Direct' || Owner.Division='Global CSM - Agencies')) || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c>=50000 && (Owner.Division='Inside CSM - US'||Owner.Division='Inside CSM - ROW'))) ,'Bucket 4', IF( ((BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=50000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <100000)&& (Owner.Division='ENT CSM - US'|| Owner.Division='Global CSM - US'|| Owner.Division='Global CSM - Investors' ||Owner.Division='Reseller - Japan' ||Owner.Division='Reseller - ANZ - Direct')) || ((BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=45000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <100000)&&(Owner.Division='ENT CSM - Europe'||Owner.Division='Global CSM - Europe' ||Owner.Division='ENT CSM - France')) || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=40000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <100000&&Owner.Division='Global CSM - Agencies') || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=30000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <50000&&Owner.Division='Inside CSM - ROW') || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=25000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <50000&&Owner.Division='Inside CSM - US') ,'Bucket 3', IF( (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=0&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <20000&& (Owner.Division='Inside CSM - ROW' ||Owner.Division='Reseller - ANZ - Direct' ||Owner.Division='Global CSM - Agencies' ||Owner.Division='ENT CSM - Europe'||Owner.Division='Global CSM - Europe' ||Owner.Division='ENT CSM - France' ||Owner.Division='ENT CSM - US'|| Owner.Division='Global CSM - US'|| Owner.Division='Global CSM - Investors')) || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=0&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <12000&&Owner.Division='Inside CSM - US') || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=0&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <30000&&Owner.Division='Reseller - Japan') ,'Bucket 1', IF( (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=20000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <45000&& (Owner.Division='ENT CSM - Europe'||Owner.Division='Global CSM - Europe' ||Owner.Division='ENT CSM - France')) || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=30000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <50000&&Owner.Division='Reseller - Japan') || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=20000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <40000&&Owner.Division='Global CSM - Agencies') || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=12000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <25000&&Owner.Division='Inside CSM - US') || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=20000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <30000&&Owner.Division='Inside CSM - ROW') || (BI_Data__r.ARR__c >=20000&&BI_Data__r.ARR__c <50000&&(Owner.Division='Reseller - ANZ - Direct' ||Owner.Division='ENT CSM - US'|| Owner.Division='Global CSM - US'|| Owner.Division='Global CSM - Investors')) ,'Bucket 2',NULL))))
CustomField.label: ARR Bucket
